language.title: Interface language
language.description: Language for the warning overlay. Supported: 'en', 'de'.

whitelistDomains.title: Exception domains
whitelistDomains.description: Domains on which the warning overlay is suppressed. Subdomains are included.

webhookEnabled.title: Enable webhook
webhookEnabled.description: Send detection events and user reports to the configured webhook URL.

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: HTTP(S) endpoint that receives JSON payloads on detection and user reports.

webhookApiKey.title: Webhook API key
webhookApiKey.description: Value sent as the 'x-api-key' header with every webhook request.

trustedBadgeEnabled.title: Show trusted badge
trustedBadgeEnabled.description: Display a verification badge on known-legitimate Microsoft login domains.

customLogoUrl.title: Custom logo URL
customLogoUrl.description: URL or Base64 data URL for the logo shown in the warning overlay header.

customWarningText.title: Custom warning message
customWarningText.description: Override the built-in warning text. HTML is supported.

showSignalDetails.title: Show signal details panel
showSignalDetails.description: Show the collapsible detection signals breakdown in the warning overlay. Set to false to hide it from end users.

accentColor.title: Accent color
accentColor.description: Hex color for buttons, borders and highlights in the warning overlay. Example: #00a19a

backgroundColor.title: Background color
backgroundColor.description: Hex color for the warning overlay background. Example: #ffffff

textColor.title: Text color
textColor.description: Hex color for body text in the warning overlay. Example: #0b1f33

customLogoUrl.title: Custom logo URL
customLogoUrl.description: URL or Base64 data URL for the logo shown in the warning overlay header.
